endpoints.label: Read Reader

fields.label: URL
fields.description: The URL to fetch content from

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: outputFormat, targetSelector, excludeSelector, enableImageCaptioning, waitForSelector)

endpoints.description: Fetches content from a URL and converts it to clean, LLM-friendly formats

endpoints.label: Search Reader

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: outputFormat, siteFilter, pageNumber)

endpoints.description: Performs a web search via Jina AI and returns top results as clean, LLM-friendly formats

endpoints.label: Deep Research Research

fields.label: Research Query
fields.placeholder: e.g. Analyze the impact of renewable energy sources on climate change mitigation
fields.description: The topic or question for the AI to research

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: maxReturnedSources, prioritizeSources, excludeSources, siteFilter)

endpoints.description: Research a topic and generate a structured research report
